text.title: Audience to Paid Conversion Loop Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Audience to Paid Conversion Loop end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: define-cohort
step.action: Specify cohort filter (SQL or analytics segment).

step.name: freeze-window
step.action: Declare window_days (e.g. 7); commit before exposing variant.

step.name: ship-variant
step.action: Deploy treatment to half cohort; control sees current.
step.decision-gate: If variant changes >1 variable, abort and reduce.

step.name: wait-full-window
step.action: Observe but do not decide; wait full window_days.

step.name: record-decide
step.action: Compute conversion_rate per arm; decide keep / drop / iterate / log-only.
